verses.arabicText: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَٰمًۭا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
verses.translationText: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you."

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَٰمٍ عَلِيمٍۢ
verses.translationText: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِى عَلَىٰٓ أَن مَّسَّنِىَ ٱلْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
verses.translationText: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?"

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ بَشَّرْنَٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْقَٰنِطِينَ
verses.translationText: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ
verses.translationText: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?"
[Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"

verses.arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.translationText: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,

verses.arabicText: إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.translationText: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all

verses.arabicText: إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَآ ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ ٱلْغَٰبِرِينَ
verses.translationText: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind.
And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,
He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown."

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ جِئْنَٰكَ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
verses.translationText: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,
And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.

verses.arabicText: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ وَٱتَّبِعْ أَدْبَٰرَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌۭ وَٱمْضُوا۟ حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.translationText: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."

verses.arabicText: وَقَضَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ مَقْطُوعٌۭ مُّصْبِحِينَ
verses.translationText: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.
And the people of the city came rejoicing.

verses.arabicText: قَالَ إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ ضَيْفِى فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
verses.translationText: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.
And fear Allah and do not disgrace me."
They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"
